input.prompt:
I'm adding dark mode to my .NET MAUI Android app. I created ResourceDictionary
themes and used StaticResource to bind colors in my XAML pages. When I
switch themes at runtime nothing changes — the colors stay the same. Also,
when the user toggles dark mode in Android settings my app seems to restart
completely. What am I doing wrong?

input.initialPrompt:
I'm adding dark mode to my .NET MAUI Android app. I created ResourceDictionary
themes and used StaticResource to bind colors in my XAML pages. When I
switch themes at runtime nothing changes — the colors stay the same. Also,
when the user toggles dark mode in Android settings my app seems to restart
completely. What am I doing wrong?

data.content:
Two separate issues:

**1. `StaticResource` doesn't update at runtime.**
`StaticResource` resolves once at load time. Switch to `DynamicResource` so bindings re-evaluate when the dictionary changes:

```xml
<!-- Instead of this: -->
<Label TextColor="{StaticResource PrimaryTextColor}" />

<!-- Use this: -->
<Label TextColor="{DynamicResource PrimaryTextColor}" />
```

Then swap themes by merging/clearing dictionaries at runtime:

```csharp
var mergedDictionaries = Application.Current.Resources.MergedDictionaries;
mergedDictionaries.Clear();
mergedDictionaries.Add(new DarkTheme()); // or LightTheme
```

**2. Activity restarts on config change.**
Android destroys the Activity when `uiMode` changes. In `Platforms/Android/MainActivity.cs`, add `UiMode` to `ConfigurationChanges`:

```csharp
[Activity(
    Theme = "@style/Maui.SplashTheme",
    ConfigurationChanges = ConfigChanges.ScreenSize
        | ConfigChanges.Orientation
        | ConfigChanges.UiMode  // ← prevents restart on dark mode toggle
        | ConfigChanges.ScreenLayout
        | ConfigChanges.SmallestScreenSize)]
public class MainActivity : MauiAppCompatActivity { }
```

Then detect the change and swap your theme:

```csharp
public override void OnConfigurationChanged(Configuration newConfig)
{
    base.OnConfigurationChanged(newConfig);

    var isDark = (newConfig.UiMode & UiMode.NightMask) == UiMode.NightYes;
    var mergedDictionaries = Application.Current.Resources.MergedDictionaries;
    mergedDictionaries.Clear();
    mergedDictionaries.Add(isDark ? new DarkTheme() : new LightTheme());
}
```

**TL;DR:** `StaticResource` → `DynamicResource` for runtime updates; add `ConfigChanges.UiMode` to prevent the Activity restart.
data.reasoningText:
The user is asking about two issues with dark mode in their .NET MAUI Android app:

1. **StaticResource doesn't update at runtime** — This is a common mistake. `StaticResource` is resolved once at load time and never updates. They need to use `DynamicResource` instead, which listens for changes to the resource dictionary.

2. **App restarts when Android dark mode is toggled** — By default, Android destroys and recreates the Activity when a configuration change (like `uiMode`) occurs. In .NET MAUI, you need to handle this by adding `ConfigChanges` to the `Activity` attribute to prevent the restart.


I'll walk through both solutions with the specific code changes needed to fix these issues.
